title: Fire Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Fire Services 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administrative headquarters for Portland Fire & Rescue. Provides public safety services including fire prevention, public education, response to fire, medical, and other emergency incidents, and disaster mitigation. Also issues fire permits. 55 SW Ash Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Permits: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm Email (503) 823-3700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION
